claim.observation: Trusted EWF fls capture at NTFS offset 1411072 records selected Windows/Prefetch paths for Chrome, OneDrive, Dropbox/DropboxUpdate, CMD, Firefox, Internet Explorer, WinWord, WhatsApp, uTorrent, and 7-Zip families; the listing includes both allocated and deleted-marked entries.
claim.interpretation: This corroborates selected Prefetch path presence in the EWF filesystem namespace, separate from the CYLR Prefetch parse. It is path-level corroboration only; it does not establish byte equality with CYLR, Prefetch last-run times from EWF, human operator, intent, or file-transfer direction.
